Name: Aug-Ins Test xrLocateSpace
Description: Phase 2d verification module. Exports xrLocateSpace; whenever the IPC dispatcher routes a space_locate_space call through the v0.2 adapter, this module's function logs the inputs it received and writes a recognizable sentinel pose into the output (position={42.0, 42.0, 42.0}). End-to-end proof that the codegen + adapter + module dispatch chain works.
